Build-Depends: debhelper-compat (= 13), dh-sequence-python3, libcanberra-dev, libcinnamon-desktop-dev (>= 6.6), libgl-dev, libglib2.0-dev, libgtk-3-dev, libice-dev, libpango1.0-dev, libsm-dev, libsystemd-dev [linux-any], libx11-dev, libxapp-dev, libxau-dev, libxcomposite-dev, libxext-dev, libxrender-dev, libxtst-dev, meson, systemd-dev [linux-any], xtrans-dev
Package-List: cinnamon-session deb x11 optional arch=any cinnamon-session-common deb x11 optional arch=all
